---
title: "Mario Alberto Arce Acosta"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    theme:
      light: [litera, custom.scss]
      dark: [superhero, custom.scss]
    highlight-style:
      light: github
      dark: monokai
---

::: {.column-screen .text-center .py-5 style="background-color: rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.05);"}
<h1 class="display-4 fw-bold mt-4">

Complex Data. Clear Answers.

</h1>

<p class="lead mb-4">

I leverage R, Stata, and Python to solve complex causal and predictive problems for organizations.

</p>

<a href="https://www.upwork.com/freelancers/marioalberto?mp_source=share" class="btn btn-upwork btn-lg mb-4" target="_blank">Hire Me on Upwork</a>
:::

::::::::::::::::: column-page
<br>

## 🏆 Elite Credibility

*My coauthored research has been selected for presentation at premier national conferences:*

::::: {.grid .text-center .py-4}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
#### 2025 APPAM

*Association for Public Policy Analysis & Management* Seattle, Washington
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
#### 2025 PAA

*Population Association of America* Washington, D.C.
:::
:::::

<hr class="my-5">

## 📈 Specialized Statistical Services

:::::::::::: grid
::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
:::: {.card .h-100 .shadow-sm .border-0 style="background-color: rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.05);"}
::: card-body
#### Causal Inference

Moving beyond correlation to establish true cause-and-effect relationships.

-   Difference-in-Differences (DiD)
-   Instrumental Variables (IV)
-   Panel Data (Random / Fixed / Mixed Effects)
-   Descriptive Regression Analysis
:::
::::
:::::

::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
:::: {.card .h-100 .shadow-sm .border-0 style="background-color: rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.05);"}
::: card-body
#### Predictive Modeling

Leveraging advanced algorithms to forecast trends and classify complex data points.

-   Machine Learning (Gradient Boosted Trees, Random Forest, KNN)
-   Survey Methodology & Post-stratification Weighting
-   Statistical Tests (A/B, T-tests, Chi-squared, Hausman)
:::
::::
:::::

::::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
:::: {.card .h-100 .shadow-sm .border-0 style="background-color: rgba(128, 128, 128, 0.05);"}
::: card-body
#### Data Pipelines & BI

From raw extraction to governed databases and automated dashboards.

-   PostgreSQL
-   Python & R
-   Plotly & Looker Studio
-   Data Governance Implementation
:::
::::
:::::
::::::::::::

<hr class="my-5">

## 💼 Proven Impact & Experience

**Data Analytics Implementation & Governance** Streamlined data collection and engineered a unified database for an academic technology center initiative. I managed the pipeline from raw vendor extracts to cleaning hundreds of thousands of rows in Google Sheets. Beyond the backend, I authored data governance policies, facilitated stakeholder meetings, and developed automated key-metric dashboards in Google Looker Studio to disseminate findings via bi-weekly strategy meetings.

**Featured Analytical Projects**

-   **Interactive Dashboards:** Built reproducible research platforms and portfolios utilizing PostgreSQL, Python, and Quarto.
-   **Economic Regression Studies:** Conducted rigorous analyses on Airbnb pricing models in Mexico and evaluated H-1B sponsor rates by industry type and geographic location.

<hr class="my-5">

::: {.text-center .py-5}
<h2 class="fw-bold">

Ready to solve your data challenges?

</h2>

<p class="lead mb-4">

I am currently accepting new freelance clients. Let's discuss your project requirements.

</p>

<a href="https://www.upwork.com/freelancers/marioalberto?mp_source=share" class="btn btn-upwork btn-lg" target="_blank">View My Profile on Upwork</a>
:::
